languages.text: "Если к вам попадут аугменты, достойные вашего внимания, мы всегда будем здесь, чтобы установить их с соблюдением всех процедур".

traits.locale_text: "Если к вам попадут аугменты, достойные вашего внимания, мы всегда будем здесь, чтобы установить их с соблюдением всех процедур".

languages.text: "If you come into possession of any augments that are worthy of your attention, we will always be here to install them in accordance with all procedures."
languages.original_text: "Если к вам попадут аугменты, достойные вашего внимания, мы всегда будем здесь, чтобы установить их с соблюдением всех процедур".

traits.locale_text: "If you come into possession of any augments that are worthy of your attention, we will always be here to install them in accordance with all procedures."
"If you come into possession of any augments that are worthy of your attention, we will always be here to install them in accordance with all procedures."
"If you come into possession of any augments that are worthy of your attention, we will always be here to install them in accordance with all procedures."

languages.text: 「もしあなたが注目に値するようなアップグレードを入手したならば、私たちはいつもここにいて、すべての手順に従ってインストールいたします」
languages.original_text: "If you come into possession of any augments that are worthy of your attention, we will always be here to install them in accordance with all procedures."

languages.text: "Elinize ilginize layık herhangi bir ogment geçerse onları tüm prosedürlere uygun olarak takmak için daima burada olacağız."
languages.original_text: "If you come into possession of any augments that are worthy of your attention, we will always be here to install them in accordance with all procedures."

traits.locale_text: "Elinize ilginize layık herhangi bir ogment geçerse onları tüm prosedürlere uygun olarak takmak için daima burada olacağız."

languages.text: “若您寻得任何有价值的植入物，我等将在此等候，依循圣律规程为您安装。”
languages.original_text: "If you come into possession of any augments that are worthy of your attention, we will always be here to install them in accordance with all procedures."

traits.locale_text: “若您寻得任何有价值的植入物，我等将在此等候，依循圣律规程为您安装。”

languages.text: "Solltet Ihr in den Besitz von Augmentationen gelangen, die Eurer Aufmerksamkeit würdig sind, stehen wir bereit, um sie im Einklang mit sämtlichen Prozeduren zu installieren."
languages.original_text: "If you come into possession of any augments that are worthy of your attention, we will always be here to install them in accordance with all procedures."

traits.locale_text: "Solltet Ihr in den Besitz von Augmentationen gelangen, die Eurer Aufmerksamkeit würdig sind, stehen wir bereit, um sie im Einklang mit sämtlichen Prozeduren zu installieren."

languages.text: « Si vous trouvez des augmentations dignes de votre attention, vous pouvez compter sur nous pour les installer dans le respect de toutes les procédures. »
languages.original_text: "If you come into possession of any augments that are worthy of your attention, we will always be here to install them in accordance with all procedures."

traits.locale_text: « Si vous trouvez des augmentations dignes de votre attention, vous pouvez compter sur nous pour les installer dans le respect de toutes les procédures. »

languages.text: «Si llegaran a sus manos aumentos dignos de su atención, estaremos listos para seguir todos los procedimientos necesarios para su instalación».
languages.original_text: "If you come into possession of any augments that are worthy of your attention, we will always be here to install them in accordance with all procedures."

traits.locale_text: «Si llegaran a sus manos aumentos dignos de su atención, estaremos listos para seguir todos los procedimientos necesarios para su instalación».
